name: context-manager
description: MCP server for managing AI context files. Submit suggestions to context documents that will be reviewed in the Context Manager UI.

authentication.description: GitHub Personal Access Token with 'repo' scope

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all available projects (repositories) that have a /context folder configured

tools.name: get_project_files
tools.description: Get all context files (.md files) for a specific project

tools.name: get_file_content
tools.description: Get the content of a specific context file

tools.name: submit_suggestion
tools.description: Submit a suggestion for a context file. The suggestion will appear in the Context Manager UI for human review before being applied.

arguments.after: ## New Decision\n\nWe decided to use TypeScript for type safety.
arguments.rationale: Adding documentation for our TypeScript decision
